confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_0d0e1658-50cd-470e-a954-f50c9c276521 read back as received

containment: Added explicit label_projection.style to narada-andrey.Kevin with role_text_hex E879F9.
corrective_action: Define label styling inheritance for identity records: identity explicit style > role/site registry style > declared default with diagnostic.
Update label builder so new schema identities inherit role affinity color from registry roles when label_projection.style is absent.
Emit diagnostics when migrated identities lack explicit or inherited style for visible role projection.
preventive_action: Add migration test from role-named identity to named-agent identity preserving role color.
Add projection test that narada-andrey.Kevin role architect renders E879F9 by inheritance or explicit style.
Add schema/preflight check for identity records that contain role but lack style and lack valid role color inheritance.
root_cause_hypothesis: The newer identity_id/site_id/role schema path did not require or inherit label_projection.style.
The label builder supports both old and new identity schema shapes, but style fallback is generic and does not derive role/site affinity from registry-level role/site color declarations.
Projection fallback produced a plausible-looking label rather than a diagnostic, hiding migration loss.
payload.summary: After the Kevin identity migration from narada-andrey.architect to narada-andrey.Kevin, the newer identity_id/site_id/role record lacked label_projection.style. Build-WindowLabelsFromIdentities.ps1 accepted the newer schema for identity and role extraction but silently fell back to default grey role_text_hex D1D5DB, causing the architect role line to render white/grey instead of fuchsia E879F9. This is a migration/projection defect: semantic role was preserved, but visual role-affinity projection was lost without diagnostic.
payload.title: CAPA: identity schema migration lost label styling for role projection
verification: Build-WindowLabelsFromIdentities.ps1 produces role_text_hex E879F9 for narada-andrey.Kevin.
No silent grey fallback occurs for identities with known roles unless explicitly configured.
